text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I've been watching this UmaTuber's twenty-four
hour livestream since last night now... Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It looks like she's fallen asleep... I could look at
her sleeping face forever. She's a real-life an...gel.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
No! Must stay awake! Mustn't miss... this
pre...cious scene...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After staying up all night watching UmaTube,
Agnes Digital is in a constant battle against
falling asleep.
